title: teline hillebrandii
intro: Teline hillebrandii, also known as Telosma hillebrandii, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Asclepiadaceae family, native to tropical Polynesia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Teline hillebrandii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate headaches, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The plant is typically prepared as an herbal tea or infused oil to utilize its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects.
